title: More Bows: Artis
description: Port of More Bows to newer MC versions
body:
**Port of More Bows to newer MC versions**

1.8.8 or higher version

1.8 version (by LucidSage)

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-bows

1.7.10 version (by NeRdTheNed)
